title: Skip and Loafer
sourceNotes: Season 1 only (12 episodes), a faithful, filler-free adaptation that covers manga chapters 1-23 (volumes 1-4), ending with the cultural festival. Manga chapters are labelled 'Scene N'. The per-episode split within each volume block is an even-pacing approximation; the overall span (ep 1-12 = ch 1-23) is firm. Manga is ongoing (serialized in Monthly Afternoon); latest chapter approximately 78 with 13 volumes as of mid-2026 (approximate). A Season 2 is announced but had not aired as of mid-2026.

mappings.arc: Second half of freshman year / first love (Vol. 5, unadapted)
Manga continues past the anime (unadapted, Vol. 6 onward)
